title: Nursery Rhyme. DXL. Natural History.
content:
As titty mouse sat in the witty to spin,
        Pussy came to her and bid her good ev'n,
        "Oh, what are you doing, my little 'oman?"
        "A spinning a doublet for my gude man."
        "Then shall I come to thee and wind up thy thread,"
        "Oh no, Mrs. Puss, you'll bite off my head."
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DXL. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
